since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.09% · Gold +1.42% · Nasdaq100 -0.89%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.98%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.98%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.43%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.43%, APP +7.49%, PUBM +7.21%, WDAY +6.71%, DV +6.58%. Laggards: TER -8.17%, NXPI -6.76%, HPE -6.57%, VRT -6.53%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.48% at $152.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
